topics: Design a database schema for an application with ER diagram from a problem description
Creation of database schema using DDL (create tables, set constraints, enforce relationships, create indices, delete and modify tables) and export ER diagram from the database to verify relationships
Database initialization – data insertion and data import (bulk import using UI and SQL commands)
Practice SQL DML commands (insertion, updating, altering, deletion of data, and querying records based on conditions)
Implementation of aggregate functions, ORDER BY, GROUP BY, and HAVING clause in SQL
Implementation of set operators, nested queries, and join queries
Practice of SQL TCL and DCL commands (Rollback, Commit, Savepoint, granting and revoking user privileges)
Practice of SQL commands for creation of views and assertions
Creation of procedures, triggers, and functions
Design a database application using any front-end tool for the problem selected in Experiment 1, with five or more tables
Perform basic CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations on a Cassandra table
Write and execute CQL queries to retrieve specific data from Cassandra tables
Create a simple application using MongoDB with Python
